sentences.arabic: وَقَفَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ عَلَى جِسْرٍ فَوْقَ النَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je stajala na mostu iznad rijeke.
sentences.translationEn: The family stood on a bridge over the river.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَاءُ صَافِيًا وَالطُّيُورُ تَطِيرُ فَوْقَهُ.
sentences.translation: Voda je bila bistra a ptice su letjele iznad.
sentences.translationEn: The water was clear and birds were flying above it.

sentences.arabic: الْتَقَطَ الْأَبُ صُورَةً لِلْعَائِلَةِ عَلَى الْجِسْرِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je snimio fotografiju porodice na mostu.
sentences.translationEn: The father took a photo of the family on the bridge.

sentences.translation: Fotografija je bila lijepa i čuvali su je.
sentences.translationEn: The photo was beautiful and they kept it.
